channel.title: Hive on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Hive on Frank Huang

item.title: Issue: Unable to instantiate org.apache.hadoop.hive.ql.metadata.SessionHiveMetaStoreClient
item.description: As the title metioned, a sort of metastore service should be running so that the hive cli could be issued. At first I thought it was like a system service such as service mysqld start to let the metastore start running. But turns out that the service application should be opening all the time. Without further setting, hive --service metastore could fix the issue. But this will cause the service run on the fore-ground.
